narrative:
Helena (precinct in Sandusky County) has 145 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.3 percentage points.
